Stethoscope / Checkup.description: Comprehensive physical examinations to monitor your pet's vital signs, weight, coat quality, and overall body wellness.

Syringe / Vaccination.description: Routine core and non-core vaccinations tailored to protect your pet against viral infections and common pathogens.

Scissors / Grooming.description: Professional washing, trimming, styling, nail clipping, and ear cleaning services to keep your pet looking and feeling great.

Dog Shield / Prevention.description: Flea, tick, heartworm, and parasite prevention plans customized to your pet's lifestyle, habits, and outdoor exposures.

Bone / Nutrition.description: Expert dietary and weight management consultations to support optimal digestion, joints, coat health, and longevity.

Medical House / Emergency.description: 24/7 urgent care and triage services for critical cases, poison exposure, traumatic injuries, or acute illnesses.

Pills / Pharmacy.description: A fully stocked on-site veterinary pharmacy supplying verified prescriptions, supplements, and specialized medications.

Heart / Surgery.description: Sophisticated surgical procedures, minor or major, handled under strict general anesthesia monitoring protocols.
